User.title: User
User.description: User profile document containing contact details and profile status.

uid.description: The unique user ID matching Auth UID.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user profile was created.

Order.title: Order
Order.description: A design/development service order requested by the client.

id.description: The unique uppercase ID of the order.

userId.description: The reference Auth UID of the ordering client.

serviceType.description: The selected package or capability service name.

requirements.description: Detailed client functional and visual requirements.

additionalNotes.description: Optional custom messages or transaction logs.

budget.description: Budget constraints or specific service price.

status.description: Overall status of the order workflow.

paymentStatus.description: The processing status of the transaction payment.

transactionId.description: The transaction ID submitted by the user.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the order was submitted.

users/{userId}.description: User accounts where documents are named by their respective UIDs.

orders/{orderId}.description: Client orders indexable by system-assigned order codes.
